//: standard-version config. Reads Conventional Commit history, bumps the version, regenerates CHANGELOG.md, and creates a git tag. `hidden: true` types still affect the bump if applicable but don't appear in the changelog (style/test/build/chore/ci are noise for end users). `chore` here is intentionally NOT a release trigger — only feat/fix/perf/revert and BREAKING CHANGE bump the version.
